info.name: Electro API
info.description:
# Electro Full API Documentation

This collection contains all endpoints for the Electro Backend, including Authentication, Products, Categories, Home, Cart, Wishlist, Vehicles, User Vehicles, Admin panel operations, etc.

## Base URL
`http://localhost:5001/api`

request.description: Registers a new user. Returns user details with an auto-incrementing integer ID and a JWT token.
Authenticates a user and returns their profile with a fresh JWT token.
Authenticates an admin user and returns their profile with a fresh JWT token.
Fetches the profile of the currently authenticated user based on the Bearer token.
Fetches categories and grouped product sections for the home screen.

body.raw:
{
    "brand": "Exide",
    "name": "Exide Matrix Red",
    "description": "High performance battery for cars",
    "price": 4500,
    "image": "https://example.com/exide.jpg",
    "type": "car"
}

request.description: Adds a product to the user's cart or increments the quantity if it already exists.
Retrieves all items currently in the user's cart.
Updates the quantity of a specific item in the cart.
Removes a specific product from the user's cart.
Fetches all saved addresses for the authenticated user.
Adds a new address for the user.
Updates an existing address by its ID.
Deletes an address by its ID.
Places an order using the active cart items.
Fetches all orders placed by the authenticated user.
Fetches all orders (Admin only).
Fetches all products in the user's wishlist.
Toggles a product's presence (adds/removes) in the user's wishlist.
Uploads an image file to the server. (Admin only)
Fetches all registered users with the role 'user'.
Deletes a customer by their auto-incrementing integer ID.
Fetches all popular search tags.
Creates a new popular search tag term.
Deletes a popular search tag using its MongoDB ObjectId.
Fetches all battery/product brands.
Fetches details of a specific brand by its auto-incremented ID.
Fetches all distinct, sorted capacities (e.g., Ah values) for products of a brand.
Creates a new brand. (Admin only)
Updates an existing brand by its ID. (Admin only)
Deletes a brand by its ID. (Admin only)
Fetches active promotional banners.
Fetches details of a specific banner.
Creates a new promotion banner. (Admin only)
Updates a banner. (Admin only)
Deletes a banner. (Admin only)
Fetches active vehicle brands.
Fetches list of vehicle types (hardcoded Sedan and SUV).
Fetches active vehicle categories.
Fetches vehicle models filtered by brand, type, or category.
Fetches all vehicle types, brands, and models in a nested structure.
Creates a new vehicle manufacturer brand. (Admin only)
Updates a vehicle brand. (Admin only)
Deletes a vehicle brand. (Admin only)
Fetches all vehicle types regardless of status. (Admin only)
Fetches all vehicle categories regardless of status. (Admin only)
Creates a new vehicle type/category ID. (Admin only)
Updates an existing vehicle type. (Admin only)
Deletes a vehicle type. (Admin only)
Creates a new sub-category of vehicles. (Admin only)
Updates a vehicle category. (Admin only)
Deletes a vehicle category. (Admin only)
Creates a new vehicle model under a brand. (Admin only)
Updates a vehicle model. (Admin only)
Deletes a vehicle model. (Admin only)
Fetches all vehicles added by the current user.
Registers a user's vehicle to their account.
Removes a vehicle from the user's account.
Creates a Paymob Payment Intention for the user's cart.
Callback endpoint for Paymob transactions webhook.
